creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170248
1.10.0-103

Attached patch updates rainloop and rainloop-community to 1.10.0-103, with fancy new mobile support.

The reason for the find(1) command at the end of do-install: is that with this update, they removed a file from .../static/css/svg/ but left the directory, which caused packaging problems.
